SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (15651486.pdf)
SUMMARY: Seeking a position as a Director of I.T. with experience in networking, troubleshooting, and customer relations.
SKILLS: Networking, Cisco IOS, Cisco Routers, Hardware, Budgeting, Change Management, Dell PowerEdge servers, Designing, ERP, Financials, Firewall, Groupwise, Help Desk Support, HP, IBM, IDS, IT Support, Laptops, Linux, MAS90, Access, Exchange, Office, Windows, Cisco UC systems, Cisco ASA/IDS/ISE/ACS/Nexus 7K/UCCX/Cisco Call Manager/Cisco Unity/Cisco Attendant Console/Cisco Jabber/Cisco Contact Center Express/Cisco Prime/WCS, Web filtering, Vendor management, Video, VPN, Vista, VoIP, WAN, Windows Server

SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2015 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Serves as the main point of contact on all I.T. related matters. Supports over 60 local and 150 remote users. Cut IT budget by 45%. Implemented new MPLS network and phone system saving $180k annually.

SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2013 to 01/2015
DESCRIPTION: Supervised IT infrastructure team and managed security solutions for over 200 local and 1500 remote users. Cut IT budget by 15%. Managed wide area networks, troubleshooted network issues, and maintained Cisco UC systems.

SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2010 to 01/2013
DESCRIPTION: Served as technical specialist and managed local/wide area networks for over 300 sites. Troubleshooted network issues and maintained Cisco UC systems.

SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2010
DESCRIPTION: Provided help desk support for over 7,000 Taco Bell stores. Troubleshooted POS and TACO computer issues.

SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2009
DESCRIPTION: Provided first-level IT support in a 300-user environment. Troubleshooted hardware and software issues for mixed environments.

SOURCE: 15651486.pdf
